# beginSession(reply:)

**Instance Method**

Begins a session with the Smart Card.

## Declaration

```swift
func beginSession(reply: @escaping @Sendable (Bool, (any Error)?) -> Void)
```

```swift
func beginSession() async throws -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **reply**: 



The `NSError` object is created in the [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKErrorDomain] domain with a code in the [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKError/Code] enumeration.

## Discussion

This method will fail if there is already an existing session for the Smart Card.

Calls to this method must be balanced with calls to [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCard/endSession()].

## Communicating with the Smart Card

- **transmit(_:reply:)**: Transmits data in Application Protocol Data Unit (APDU) format to the Smart Card.
- **endSession()**: Completes any pending transmissions and ends the session to the Smart Card.
